title: Inventory current data boundaries
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/01-boundary-inventory.md. Acceptance: create or update docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/inventory.md; enumerate YAML/frontmatter sources for compare, news authors, news articles, status incidents, people profiles; list internal snake_case hotspots for compare, news, status, people, mentions; list public JSON/discovery/llms/Markdown surfaces at risk; separately record enum/string literal values needing explicit mapping. Verification: documentation-only diff review; no code tests required if no code changes.

title: Migrate internal mention contracts to camelCase
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/02-mention-contracts.md. Acceptance: EntityMentionTarget and related internal types use camelCase fields such as labelCases, htmlUrl, markdownUrl, linkTitle and linkContext; EntityMentionSourceRef and graph/source-ref helpers use camelCase fields such as targetType, targetSlug, sourceSection, sourceKind, sourceId, mentionedAt, sortKey and sourceEntity; source adapters for news, status and people are updated; legacy public people/backlink names, if still needed, live only in explicit public adapters or DTOs; mention layer and source adapter tests are updated. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/mentions src/lib/news/mentions.test.ts src/lib/status/mentions.test.ts src/lib/people/mentions.test.ts; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Create compare raw/domain foundation
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/03-compare-raw-domain-foundation.md. Acceptance: split compare raw schemas into Raw*Schema contracts; raw types use z.output<typeof Raw*Schema> and are not named as domain models; handwritten readonly camelCase domain interfaces cover settlement, location, tariff, lots, infrastructure, common spaces, service model, source and management company; mapper RawSettlement -> Settlement explicitly translates fields and enum/string literal values including multi-word raw values such as rub_per_sotka, partial_asphalt and checkpoint_only; existing compare schema tests are moved or supplemented and focused mapper tests are added. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/compare/lib/schema.test.ts; run the focused mapper tests; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 04: Compare core domain migration
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/04-compare-core-domain-migration.md. Acceptance: loadSettlements() returns domain Settlement[]; compare core modules use domain fields such as shortName, isBaseline, managementCompany, commonSpaces and serviceModel; tariff calculations use domain tariff fields and enum values; core tests use domain objects or mapper fixtures; apps/www/src/compare/lib has no ordinary raw snake_case access outside raw schemas, mapper, public adapters, test fixtures and migration comments. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/compare/lib; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 05: Compare UI and public adapters
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/05-compare-public-ui-migration.md. Acceptance: Astro compare routes use domain fields and avoid raw settlement shape; Svelte compare components receive camelCase props or explicit component DTOs; public compare JSON is built through a dedicated public DTO adapter; compare discovery schemas and llms descriptions match the actual public DTO; if public compare JSON field names change, tests explicitly fix the new contract and agent-facing docs are updated; compare UI and route code has no raw snake_case access except an intentional legacy public adapter. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/compare; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 06: News raw/domain foundation
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/06-news-raw-domain-foundation.md. Acceptance: News author raw schema is extracted or wrapped as reusable RawNewsAuthorSchema; news article frontmatter raw schema is extracted or wrapped as reusable RawNewsArticleSchema; content.config.ts imports raw schemas or thin schema builders instead of owning the full news raw contract inline; news domain interfaces move or are prepared to move into types.ts and schema.ts no longer mixes validators with domain types; domain interfaces are readonly snapshots, including nested objects and arrays; NewsAuthor uses shortName instead of short_name through an explicit RawNewsAuthor -> NewsAuthor mapper. Do not change article public output unless required for author migration. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/news; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 07: News article domain migration
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/07-news-article-domain-migration.md. Acceptance: NewsArticle, NewsListArticle, NewsEvent, NewsDataset and related internal interfaces use camelCase fields; raw frontmatter fields such as markdown_url, published_at, published_iso, source_url, cover_url, cover_alt, starts_at, starts_iso, ics_url, by_id and by_tag are replaced by domain names outside raw schema/mapper/public DTO/test fixtures; article mapper or loader boundary explicitly builds domain articles from raw frontmatter, rendered body, author and assets; news public feeds, RSS, Markdown companions, discovery and llms use explicit public adapters where output shape differs from domain; tests cover domain behavior and public DTO contracts separately. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/news; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 08: Status raw/domain foundation
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/08-status-raw-domain-foundation.md. Acceptance: Status incident raw schema is extracted or wrapped as reusable RawStatusIncidentSchema; domain status types live separately from raw schema and do not import Zod; StatusIncident, StatusServiceSummary, StatusDataset and related interfaces use readonly camelCase domain fields; loader or mapper explicitly maps raw started_at, ended_at and source_url into domain fields; status service/kind/area string values pass through an explicit mapper even when values currently match; existing status load/schema tests are updated for domain names. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/status/load.test.ts src/lib/status/schema.test.ts; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 09: Status UI and public adapters
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/09-status-public-ui-migration.md. Acceptance: Astro/Svelte/status components use domain fields or explicit camelCase component DTOs; timeline DOM JSON payloads have a typed DTO and adapter from the domain model; public status discovery, llms, Markdown and JSON surfaces use explicit public DTO adapters; raw-style fields such as started_iso, ended_iso, is_active, started_has_time, source_url and sort_last_change_at are not used as internal component models; DOM timeline, service card and public surface tests are updated. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/status src/components/status; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 10: People raw/domain foundation
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/10-people-raw-domain-foundation.md. Acceptance: People raw schema is extracted or wrapped as reusable RawPersonProfileSchema; people domain interfaces for profiles, contacts, backlinks and dataset are handwritten readonly camelCase snapshots; name_cases maps to nameCases; markdown_url, by_slug and mention_registry become markdownUrl, bySlug and mentionRegistry in internal code; contact normalization has an explicit raw/domain boundary; people load/schema tests are updated for domain names. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/people/load.test.ts src/lib/people/schema.test.ts; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 11: People public surfaces and backlinks
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/11-people-public-and-backlinks.md. Acceptance: people public JSON/discovery/llms outputs are built through public DTO adapters or explicit serializers; backlinks are built from domain mention graph and domain people profiles through adapters; internal code uses nameCases, markdownUrl, htmlUrl, sourceId and sortKey in camelCase; any preserved legacy public name_cases/html_url/markdown_url behavior is explicitly described in public adapter tests. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/people; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 12: Public DTO contracts across sections
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/12-public-dto-contracts.md. Acceptance: compare, news, status and people have explicit public DTO or serializer functions beside public surface implementations; public JSON fields are camelCase unless a legacy/external contract explicitly requires otherwise; discovery schemas describe actual public DTOs rather than internal domain interfaces; llms.txt, llms-full.txt and section llms docs match the public shape; tests cover stable public fields, URLs and schemas without depending on raw/domain internals; intentional legacy public fields are listed in inventory or context notes. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/root-discovery-routes.test.ts src/lib/news src/lib/status src/lib/people src/compare/lib; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck.

title: Step 13: Final guardrails and cleanup
description: Artifact: docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/tasks/13-final-guardrails.md. Acceptance: remove temporary compatibility exports added during migration; add or extend architecture guardrails so raw snake_case is forbidden in domain/internal files while allowlisting raw schemas, mappers, public legacy adapters, fixtures and documentation; guard against z.infer/z.output being used as domain interface shortcuts; guard or checklist readonly domain interfaces against mutable arrays/maps and unreasoned mutable nested shapes; update docs/migrations/raw-to-domain-data/CONTEXT.md task status; add a short future-agent rule for Raw DTO -> domain model -> public DTO in apps/www/AGENTS.md or another appropriate rules file; document unrelated failures if any. Verification: pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test; pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck; pnpm build.
